creator: franz@bett.ag
text:
Created attachment 165112
Now with PORTREVISION at the right place

Thanks for teaching me that i should always run portlint before submitting. :)

Apparently PORTREVISION was set too late, now it "looks fine." and compiles on amd64/i386 on 10.2-RELEASE and 9.3-RELEASE (tested with poudriere).
